1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline">Du kontrollerer dine eigne data!</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav><ul class="ml-10 flex flex-wrap gap-x-5 gap-y-2 text-attvin-purple"><li class="!mb-0"><a class="text-[18px] leading-[130%] hover:border-b-2 hover:border-opacity-40 border-attvin-purple" href="/re
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (10 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');">Les meir om informasjonskapslar</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/" target="_blank">Cookie Information</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline">Du kontrollerer dine eigne data!</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav><ul class="ml-10 flex flex-wrap gap-x-5 gap-y-2 text-attvin-purple"><li class="!mb-0"><a class="text-[18px] leading-[130%] hover:border-b-2 hover:border-opacity-40 border-attvin-purple" href="/re
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (14 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');">Les meir om informasjonskapslar</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/" target="_blank">Cookie Information</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="inline-block w-full p-2 leading-[130%] text-[18px] font-semibold" href="https://attvin.no/miside?vis=adgangsbevis&tittel=Adgangsbevis" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><div clas
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

2.1.1 Tastatur (11 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button disabled="" id="coi-expand" tabindex="-1"><div></div></button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-controls="coiConsentBannerCategoriesWrapper" aria-expanded="true" aria-label="Skjul detaljer" id="hide_details" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="-1">Skjul detaljer</button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline">Du kontrollerer dine eigne data!</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav><ul class="ml-10 flex flex-wrap gap-x-5 gap-y-2 text-attvin-purple"><li class="!mb-0"><a class="text-[18px] leading-[130%] hover:border-b-2 hover:border-opacity-40 border-attvin-purple" href="/re
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');">Les meir om informasjonskapslar</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/" target="_blank">Cookie Information</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="h3 text-attvin-purple-dark mr-4 text-white">Søk</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav><ul class="ml-10 flex flex-wrap gap-x-5 gap-y-2 text-attvin-purple"><li class="!mb-0"><a class="text-[18px] leading-[130%] hover:border-b-2 hover:border-opacity-40 border-attvin-purple" href="/re
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="inline-block w-full p-2 leading-[130%] text-[18px] font-semibold" href="https://attvin.no/miside?vis=adgangsbevis&tittel=Adgangsbevis" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><div clas
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-hidden="true" class="group inline-block w-full p-2 leading-[130%] text-[18px] font-semibold" href="https://attvin.no/miside?vis=adgangsbevis&tittel=Adgangsbevis" rel="noopener noreferrer"
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="text-attvin-pink underline transition duration-300 hover:text-attvin-red-medium" href="https://facebook.com/attvin" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Facebook</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="text-attvin-pink underline transition duration-300 hover:text-attvin-red-medium" href="https://instagram.com/attvin" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Instagram</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-label="Tøm søk" class="absolute right-[20px] text-attvin-purple-medium" data-react-aria-pressable="true" tabindex="-1" type="button"><svg fill="none" height="32" viewbox="0 0 32 32" width
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-label="Tøm søk" class="absolute right-[20px] text-attvin-purple-medium" data-react-aria-pressable="true" tabindex="-1" type="button"><svg fill="none" height="32" viewbox="0 0 32 32" width
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-hidden="true" aria-label="Mi side" class="flex h-auto w-fit items-center justify-center rounded-full p-2 pr-5 bg-attvin-purple" tabindex="-1"><svg fill="none" height="32" viewbox="0 0 32
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (3 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: 'react-aria-_R_9id69mH1_'

<input aria-label="Search" aria-labelledby="react-aria-_R_9id69mH1_" class="w-full rounded-full p-5 pr-12 leading-none placeholder-attvin-purple-dark outline-2 placeholder:italic focus:outline-none fo
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: 'react-aria-_R_16dmH1_'

<input aria-label="Search" aria-labelledby="react-aria-_R_16dmH1_" class="w-full rounded-full p-5 pr-12 leading-none placeholder-attvin-purple-dark outline-2 placeholder:italic focus:outline-none focu
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-label="Hjemmesiden" class="flex items-end" href="/" role="button"><svg class="h-[45px] w-[166px] transition duration-300 md:h-[35px] md:w-[125px]" fill="#5C3CB5" height="35" viewbox="0 0 125 3
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="h3 text-attvin-purple-dark mr-4 text-white">Søk</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav><ul class="ml-10 flex flex-wrap gap-x-5 gap-y-2 text-attvin-purple"><li class="!mb-0"><a class="text-[18px] leading-[130%] hover:border-b-2 hover:border-opacity-40 border-attvin-purple" href="/re
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="inline-block w-full p-2 leading-[130%] text-[18px] font-semibold" href="https://attvin.no/miside?vis=adgangsbevis&tittel=Adgangsbevis" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><div clas
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-hidden="true" class="group inline-block w-full p-2 leading-[130%] text-[18px] font-semibold" href="https://attvin.no/miside?vis=adgangsbevis&tittel=Adgangsbevis" rel="noopener noreferrer"
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="text-attvin-pink underline transition duration-300 hover:text-attvin-red-medium" href="https://facebook.com/attvin" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Facebook</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="text-attvin-pink underline transition duration-300 hover:text-attvin-red-medium" href="https://instagram.com/attvin" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Instagram</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-label="Tøm søk" class="absolute right-[20px] text-attvin-purple-medium" data-react-aria-pressable="true" tabindex="-1" type="button"><svg fill="none" height="32" viewbox="0 0 32 32" width
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-label="Tøm søk" class="absolute right-[20px] text-attvin-purple-medium" data-react-aria-pressable="true" tabindex="-1" type="button"><svg fill="none" height="32" viewbox="0 0 32 32" width
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-hidden="true" aria-label="Mi side" class="flex h-auto w-fit items-center justify-center rounded-full p-2 pr-5 bg-attvin-purple" tabindex="-1"><svg fill="none" height="32" viewbox="0 0 32
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (3 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: 'react-aria-_R_9id69mH1_'

<input aria-label="Search" aria-labelledby="react-aria-_R_9id69mH1_" class="w-full rounded-full p-5 pr-12 leading-none placeholder-attvin-purple-dark outline-2 placeholder:italic focus:outline-none fo
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: 'react-aria-_R_16dmH1_'

<input aria-label="Search" aria-labelledby="react-aria-_R_16dmH1_" class="w-full rounded-full p-5 pr-12 leading-none placeholder-attvin-purple-dark outline-2 placeholder:italic focus:outline-none focu
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

<a aria-label="Hjemmesiden" class="flex items-end" href="/" role="button"><svg class="h-[45px] w-[166px] transition duration-300 md:h-[35px] md:w-[125px]" fill="#5C3CB5" height="35" viewbox="0 0 125 3
Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline">Du kontrollerer dine eigne data!</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="h3 text-attvin-purple-dark">Kva er samarbeidsrenovasjon?</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav><ul class="ml-10 flex flex-wrap gap-x-5 gap-y-2 text-attvin-purple"><li class="!mb-0"><a class="text-[18px] leading-[130%] hover:border-b-2 hover:border-opacity-40 border-attvin-purple" href="/re
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');">Les meir om informasjonskapslar</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/" target="_blank">Cookie Information</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="inline-block w-full p-2 leading-[130%] text-[18px] font-semibold" href="https://attvin.no/miside?vis=adgangsbevis&tittel=Adgangsbevis" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><div clas
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-hidden="true" class="group inline-block w-full p-2 leading-[130%] text-[18px] font-semibold" href="https://attvin.no/miside?vis=adgangsbevis&tittel=Adgangsbevis" rel="noopener noreferrer"
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="css-1xrgf0j" data-index="1" href="https://attvin.no/personvern" rel="noreferrer" target="_blank">personvernerklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="https://feathery.io" rel="noopener" style="text-decoration: none;" target="_blank"></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="text-attvin-pink underline transition duration-300 hover:text-attvin-red-medium" href="https://facebook.com/attvin" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Facebook</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="text-attvin-pink underline transition duration-300 hover:text-attvin-red-medium" href="https://instagram.com/attvin" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Instagram</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'telefonnummer' missing autocomplete attribute

<input aria-label="" class="css-vbm9yk" id="telefonnummer" inputmode="numeric" maxlength="8" minlength="8" name="telefonnummer" placeholder="" required="" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='tel' to help users fill in the form

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (57 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline">Du kontrollerer dine eigne data!</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5 class="h5 text-attvin-purple-dark !mb-0">Ålesund</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5 class="h5 text-attvin-purple-dark !mb-0">Prisliste for identifiserte husholdningskunder (Privat) *Etter oppbrukt kvote!</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5 class="h5 text-attvin-purple-dark !mb-0">Ålesund</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav><ul class="ml-10 flex flex-wrap gap-x-5 gap-y-2 text-attvin-purple"><li class="!mb-0"><a class="text-[18px] leading-[130%] hover:border-b-2 hover:border-opacity-40 border-attvin-purple" href="/re
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Data table has no caption or label

<table class="mb-10 w-full table-auto text-left"><thead><tr class="border-b border-b-attvin-purple"><th class="p-2">Tjeneste</th><th class="p-2">Pris</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class="border-b border

Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<th class="p-2">Tjeneste</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');">Les meir om informasjonskapslar</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

https://attvin.no/

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline">Du kontrollerer dine eigne data!</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav><ul class="ml-10 flex flex-wrap gap-x-5 gap-y-2 text-attvin-purple"><li class="!mb-0"><a class="text-[18px] leading-[130%] hover:border-b-2 hover:border-opacity-40 border-attvin-purple" href="/re
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (10 avvik)

MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');">Les meir om informasjonskapslar</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline">Du kontrollerer dine eigne data!</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav><ul class="ml-10 flex flex-wrap gap-x-5 gap-y-2 text-attvin-purple"><li class="!mb-0"><a class="text-[18px] leading-[130%] hover:border-b-2 hover:border-opacity-40 border-attvin-purple" href="/re
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');">Les meir om informasjonskapslar</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline">Du kontrollerer dine eigne data!</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="h4 text-attvin-purple-dark"><strong>Husk å gjøre følgende:</strong></h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav><ul class="ml-10 flex flex-wrap gap-x-5 gap-y-2 text-attvin-purple"><li class="!mb-0"><a class="text-[18px] leading-[130%] hover:border-b-2 hover:border-opacity-40 border-attvin-purple" href="/re
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');">Les meir om informasjonskapslar</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/" target="_blank">Cookie Information</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="inline-block w-full p-2 leading-[130%] text-[18px] font-semibold" href="https://attvin.no/miside?vis=adgangsbevis&tittel=Adgangsbevis" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><div clas
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

2.1.1 Tastatur (11 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button disabled="" id="coi-expand" tabindex="-1"><div></div></button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-controls="coiConsentBannerCategoriesWrapper" aria-expanded="true" aria-label="Skjul detaljer" id="hide_details" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="-1">Skjul detaljer</button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline">Du kontrollerer dine eigne data!</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="h3 text-attvin-purple-dark !mb-9">Nyheter</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav><ul class="ml-10 flex flex-wrap gap-x-5 gap-y-2 text-attvin-purple"><li class="!mb-0"><a class="text-[18px] leading-[130%] hover:border-b-2 hover:border-opacity-40 border-attvin-purple" href="/re
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');">Les meir om informasjonskapslar</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/" target="_blank">Cookie Information</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="inline-block w-full p-2 leading-[130%] text-[18px] font-semibold" href="https://attvin.no/miside?vis=adgangsbevis&tittel=Adgangsbevis" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><div clas
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-hidden="true" class="group inline-block w-full p-2 leading-[130%] text-[18px] font-semibold" href="https://attvin.no/miside?vis=adgangsbevis&tittel=Adgangsbevis" rel="noopener noreferrer"
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="text-attvin-pink underline transition duration-300 hover:text-attvin-red-medium" href="https://facebook.com/attvin" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Facebook</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="text-attvin-pink underline transition duration-300 hover:text-attvin-red-medium" href="https://instagram.com/attvin" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Instagram</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline">Du kontrollerer dine eigne data!</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="h3 text-attvin-purple-dark">Slik søkjer du om tilskot</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav><ul class="ml-10 flex flex-wrap gap-x-5 gap-y-2 text-attvin-purple"><li class="!mb-0"><a class="text-[18px] leading-[130%] hover:border-b-2 hover:border-opacity-40 border-attvin-purple" href="/re
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');">Les meir om informasjonskapslar</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/" target="_blank">Cookie Information</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="inline-block w-full p-2 leading-[130%] text-[18px] font-semibold" href="https://attvin.no/miside?vis=adgangsbevis&tittel=Adgangsbevis" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><div clas
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-hidden="true" class="group inline-block w-full p-2 leading-[130%] text-[18px] font-semibold" href="https://attvin.no/miside?vis=adgangsbevis&tittel=Adgangsbevis" rel="noopener noreferrer"
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="https://feathery.io" rel="noopener" style="text-decoration: none;" target="_blank"></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="text-attvin-pink underline transition duration-300 hover:text-attvin-red-medium" href="https://facebook.com/attvin" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Facebook</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="text-attvin-pink underline transition duration-300 hover:text-attvin-red-medium" href="https://instagram.com/attvin" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Instagram</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input aria-label="" id="error_569461fe-9567-493c-a508-c88aca5ccbe3" inputmode="none" name="error_569461fe-9567-493c-a508-c88aca5ccbe3" style="pointer-events: none; position: absolute; opacity: 0; top
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (12 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button disabled="" id="coi-expand" tabindex="-1"><div></div></button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline">Du kontrollerer dine eigne data!</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav><ul class="ml-10 flex flex-wrap gap-x-5 gap-y-2 text-attvin-purple"><li class="!mb-0"><a class="text-[18px] leading-[130%] hover:border-b-2 hover:border-opacity-40 border-attvin-purple" href="/re
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');">Les meir om informasjonskapslar</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/" target="_blank">Cookie Information</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button disabled="" id="coi-expand" tabindex="-1"><div></div></button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="coi-banner__headline" id="coiBannerHeadline">Du kontrollerer dine eigne data!</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav><ul class="ml-10 flex flex-wrap gap-x-5 gap-y-2 text-attvin-purple"><li class="!mb-0"><a class="text-[18px] leading-[130%] hover:border-b-2 hover:border-opacity-40 border-b-2 border-attvin-purple
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h2 class="h3 text-attvin-purple-dark text-white"></h2>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');">Les meir om informasjonskapslar</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/" target="_blank">Cookie Information</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="inline-block w-full p-2 leading-[130%] text-[18px] font-semibold" href="https://attvin.no/miside?vis=adgangsbevis&tittel=Adgangsbevis" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><div clas
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-hidden="true" class="group inline-block w-full p-2 leading-[130%] text-[18px] font-semibold" href="https://attvin.no/miside?vis=adgangsbevis&tittel=Adgangsbevis" rel="noopener noreferrer"
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (115 characters)

<a aria-label="Les mer: Det som ikkje skal i dunkane, skal til miljøstasjonane. Her får du oversikt over alle våre miljøstasjonar." href="/miljostasjonar"><div class="relative rounded-xl overflow-hidd
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Les mer: Gå til Min side'

<a aria-label="Les mer: Gå til Min side" class="btn btn-green-light mrbombastic" href="/miside?vis=minside&tittel=Min%20side">Gå til Min side</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="text-attvin-pink underline transition duration-300 hover:text-attvin-red-medium" href="https://facebook.com/attvin" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Facebook</a>

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

https://arim.no
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://arim.no --max-pages 16 --format html
